text.title: AGENTS.md Per-Module Bootstrap Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of AGENTS.md Per-Module Bootstrap.

example.scenario: Monorepo with 12 packages: 11 have AGENTS.md, 1 missing. Validator flags the missing one; author writes a 40-line AGENTS.md with file table + gotchas.
